description_long: This sculpture features a stylized, partially fragmented human face emerging from a smooth, geometric pedestal. The facial features are expressive, with pronounced cheekbones, a defined nose, and a subtle, enigmatic smile. The top of the head is irregular and broken, giving the impression of an incomplete or eroded bust. The back of the head is rough and unfinished, contrasting with the smoother front and sides. The pedestal is a simple, angular block that provides stability and visual contrast to the organic form above. The entire piece is rendered in a uniform, matte white material, evoking the appearance of plaster or marble.
description: A fragmented human face bust with expressive features sits atop a smooth, angular pedestal, all in matte white.
description_view_0: Front view shows the expressive face, broken upper head, and the full width of the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face and the depth of the broken head, with the pedestal extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the rough, unfinished back of the head and the broad, flat back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the facial profile and the irregular, jagged edge of the head, with the pedestal's side visible.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and featureless.
